subject: ODD/EVEN Frame Averages in Warp1.1 beta
body:
Dear All,

odd/even frame averages are currently saved in a different size than the 
original images

In my case, full frame = 4096^2 (Falcon4i), but odd/even = 1600^2

Is there any reason for that, and can it be changed to full frame?

Thanks,

Philipp.
